modpack.tame_scrimblows: Can be used to tame Scrimblows
modpack.breed_scrimblows: Can be used to breed Scrimblows
modpack.dripping_crying_1: Drips water into a cauldron, when pointed two blocks above dripstone
modpack.dripping_crying_2: Will eventually decay, if used for this purpose
modpack.tnt_tip: Has bigger explosion power in the Nether
modpack.mi_unlocked: You discover a brand new way to create materials and machines...
modpack.mi_how_to_unlock: Unlocks the rest of Modern Industrialization upon obtaining
modpack.hook_changes_1: Decreased travel speed by 50%, but increased pull speed by 33%
modpack.anvil: Can be placed down with dispensers
modpack.redstone_automation: Can be put in an item frame next to dispensers, crafters or droppers to make them constantly activate
modpack.dragon_egg_1: Every successful dragon kill drops an egg
modpack.dragon_egg_2: Can be turned into treasure bag to get rewards
modpack.obsidian_tool: Mines in 5x5, but reduced durability from 11200 to 2890
modpack.emerald_tool: Mines in 5x5, but reduced durability from 9768 to 1300
modpack.storage_controller: Reduced range from 50 blocks to 16 blocks
modpack.rftoolsbuilder_1: 2x increased power consumption of all actions
modpack.dragon_message: The Ender Dragon is optional in Clayblock! Explore the End and its new resources at your own pace and challenge the dragon for extra resources!
modpack.dragon_treasure.name: Ender Dragon Treasure Bag
modpack.advancement.clay_0.title: Claytopia
modpack.advancement.clay_0.desc: A world of clay... and more clay
modpack.advancement.clay_1.title: First Compression
modpack.advancement.clay_1.desc:
Obtain the first compression of clay (16 clayballs)

It cannot be broken by hands!
modpack.advancement.clay_2.title: Second Complication
modpack.advancement.clay_2.desc:
Obtain the second compression of clay (64 clayballs)

Seems to work like a tree log...
modpack.advancement.clay_3.title: Third Conglomerate
modpack.advancement.clay_3.desc:
Obtain the third compression of clay (256 clayballs)

How it can be cooked into something useful?
modpack.advancement.clay_4.title: Fourth Confederation
modpack.advancement.clay_4.desc:
Obtain the fourth compression of clay (1,024 clayballs)

It became metallic enough for decent equipment
modpack.advancement.clay_5.title: Fifth Confluence
modpack.advancement.clay_5.desc:
Obtain the fifth compression of clay (4,096 clayballs)

Have you explored the underground enough yet?
modpack.advancement.clay_6.title: Sixth Coagulation
modpack.advancement.clay_6.desc:
Obtain the sixth compression of clay (16,384 clayballs)

The density of clay molecules can be described as brilliant
modpack.advancement.clay_7.title: Seventh Coacervate
modpack.advancement.clay_7.desc:
Obtain the seventh compression of clay (65,536 clayballs)

You should get ready enough to take on deeper depths
modpack.advancement.clay_8.title: Eight Coadjuvancy
modpack.advancement.clay_8.desc:
Obtain the eight compression of clay (262,144 clayballs)

The mass of resulting blob is enough to tear dimensions!
modpack.advancement.terracotta_0.title: Step to Baking
modpack.advancement.terracotta_0.desc: Seek the camp sites of grays to harden your clay mass
modpack.advancement.terracotta_1.title: Hop to Sturdiness
modpack.advancement.terracotta_1.desc:
Obtain the first compression of terracotta (4 terracotta)

Baking blobs of clay and terracotta may yield useful things
modpack.advancement.terracotta_2.title: Jump to Stability
modpack.advancement.terracotta_2.desc:
Obtain the second compression of terracotta (16 terracotta)

It is solid enough to crumble into dust on heating
modpack.advancement.terracotta_3.title: Leap to Science
modpack.advancement.terracotta_3.desc:
Obtain the third compression of terracotta (64 terracotta)

The clay power is in your hands now
modpack.advancement.terracotta_4.title: Pounce to Sacristy
modpack.advancement.terracotta_4.desc:
Obtain the fourth compression of terracotta (256 terracotta)

Have you heard of Temple of Color?
modpack.advancement.terracotta_5.title: Dive to Spontaneity
modpack.advancement.terracotta_5.desc:
Obtain the fifth compression of terracotta (1,024 terracotta)

Colored terracotta yields colorful gems and crystals on being exploded
modpack.advancement.terracotta_6.title: Plunge to Systematics
modpack.advancement.terracotta_6.desc:
Obtain the sixth compression of terracotta (4,096 terracotta)

Automate the growth and collection of every clay asset no matter how small
modpack.advancement.terracotta_7.title: Spring to Synthesis
modpack.advancement.terracotta_7.desc:
Obtain the seventh compression of terracotta (4,096 terracotta)

Automate the growth and collection of every clay asset no matter how small
modpack.advancement.terracotta_8.title: Vault to Symbolism
modpack.advancement.terracotta_8.desc:
Obtain the eight compression of terracotta (16,768 terracotta)

You probably have experienced the joy and heat of hell, aren't ya?
